creator: ronald-lists@klop.ws
text:
Aarch64 pkgs for 113-quarterly and 121-quarterly are building again. Thanks for fixing! [1]

The head-latest build is still failing on building 'ports-mgmt/pkg' because of a "Bad system call" [2]. I guess the host kernel needs an upgrade.
Head-latest is broken since January, 13th.

See:
[1] http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/index.html
[2] http://thunderx1.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-arm64-default/p530538_s359627/logs/pkg-1.14.2.log
